title: Il signor Max
writer: Amleto Palermi, Mario Camerini, Mario Soldati
actors: Vittorio De Sica, Assia Noris, Rubi Dalma
plot: Vittorio De Sica, heir to a large sum of money and owner of a newspaper vending stall, makes enough money out of his business to take a vacation at a fashionable resort. He is given a cruise ticket by an aristocrat who is an old s...
